changelog: 1.3.0 — SSO sign-in gate via Cloudflare Access (Google Workspace). Reimagined 3-tab UI: Today (status + sync controls) · Health (perms + diagnostics) · Settings (advanced + sign out). Theme refresh to greencommllc.com forest #1E4D2B. New /api/phone/sync/state endpoint primes cursors on fresh install. Dynamic User-Agent.
